title: The Conquest of Tustar
description: According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, Talhah, alMuhallab and 'Amr: When al-Hurmuzan had been defeated on the day (of the battle) of Suq al-Ahwaz, and after Hurqu$ b. Zuhayr had conquered that city, the latter took up residence there. He dispatched Jaz' b. Mu'awiyah to Surrag435 in pursuit of al-Hurmuzan, as 'Umar had ordered. 'Umar had charged Hurquq, should God conquer the area for them, to send Jaz' after al-Hurmuzan in pursuit, and also to take the direction to Surraq.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
